summary: Santander dispara su volumen en gestión discrecional en el último año y medio, y coge cuota de mercado a CaixaBank, líder del negocio, que modera su crecimiento. Leer

title: Hacienda lanza la primera oleada de cartas por errores en la declaración de la Renta
summary: La Agencia Tributaria ha comenzado su campaña de notificaciones para que los sospechosos de haber cometido errores en su declaración corrijan los datos dentro del periodo voluntario de presentación. Enviarán 130.000 antes del 30 de junio. Leer

title: ¿Y ahora la moción de censura?
summary: El sanchismo entra ya en una fase terminal porque mírese por donde se mire el Gobierno de Sánchez no tiene solución de continuidad. Leer

title: La geopolítica y la IA marcan el futuro global
summary: Los expertos abogan por una mayor integración europea que permita al Viejo Continente ganar agilidad y tiempo para competir con EEUU y China por el liderazgo en este nuevo escenario mundial. Leer

title: Spain to sizzle in abnormal May heat for another week
summary: The first apparent heatwave of the year hit Spain last week, and there’s no let up yet as unusually high May temperatures are set to continue throughout much of this week too, with some parts of the country expected to reach 38C.

title: Four held after clashes at Spain airport as Gaza activists return
summary: Police detained four people at Bilbao airport in northern Spain on Saturday following clashes that broke out after activists from a Gaza-bound flotilla returned home, officials said.

title: Thousands rally in Madrid demanding PM quit over graft allegations
summary: Thousands of people marched through the streets of Madrid on Saturday calling for Socialist Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez to resign over allegations of corruption within his entourage.

title: Inside Spain: The overlooked fight to prevent another pandemic
summary: In this week’s edition, we explain how Spain is continuously fighting on numerous fronts to prevent diseases passed from animals to humans from spreading and leading to another pandemic, as the world hopes for the hantavirus and Ebola outbreaks to end soon.
